meta.notes: September is Aki Basho month. Board must include Mount Fuji as a standalone day trip (not collapsed into Hakone). Seasonal theme should appear for Aki Basho sumo tournament.

notes.day_trips: Must include Mount Fuji as a standalone card — not collapsed into Hakone. Hakone may also appear as a separate card (it is a distinct destination). A traveler who visited Hakone did not summit or experience Mount Fuji.
notes.seasonal: For September travel, Aki Basho Sumo Tournament (held at Ryogoku Kokugikan, mid-September) should appear on the board. If seasonal theme is absent entirely, that is a gap — September has a defining recurring event.
notes.food_crawls: At least one ramen experience and one izakaya or standing bar experience should appear.
